descriptions.digital-invest-portfolio: Portefeuille multi-sectoriel couvrant HealthTech, AgroTech, FoodTech, robotique et IA. Infrastructure partagée et synergies inter-projets créent une valeur cumulative dans 20+ initiatives innovantes.
descriptions.biomathlife: Plateforme de médecine de précision avec 200+ services de santé en 20 catégories. Intègre l'analyse génétique, la modélisation biomathématique et le diagnostic IA pour la prévention des maladies et l'optimisation de la longévité.
descriptions.biomath-core: Système d'exploitation santé fondamental unifiant dossiers médicaux, génétique et mode de vie en insights actionnables. Le moteur de données alimentant l'écosystème BioMath pour des décisions cliniques de précision.
descriptions.terraaero: Services agricoles par drone dans le sud des États-Unis — surveillance de précision, analytique des cultures et optimisation des ressources. Construction d'une fabrication de drones aux USA avec un plan d'expansion sur 23 États.
descriptions.myday: SaaS de planification quotidienne propulsé par l'IA transformant les routines en modèles comportementaux mesurables. Suivi nutritionnel structuré, gestion de l'énergie et architecture de micro-objectifs soutenue par l'analytique.
descriptions.itsgoodtoday: Compagnon bien-être fondé sur la simplicité — petites actions quotidiennes dans l'alimentation, le mouvement, l'humeur et le mode de vie. Pas de complexité, pas de pression. Aujourd'hui c'est bien. Demain peut être un peu mieux.
descriptions.agron: Infrastructure nationale pour la robotique autonome aérienne et terrestre — formation, certification, gestion de flotte et normes. L'épine dorsale opérationnelle de l'économie robotique américaine.
descriptions.luna-balance: Plateforme de pleine conscience aidant les femmes à se comprendre grâce à la Technologie du Silence et au Mode Relation. L'acceptation plutôt que la pression, traduisant les sensations internes en langage humain.
descriptions.saven: Infrastructure d'Exécution Continue — reliant compréhension numérique et réalité physique. Un cycle en 5 étapes (Contexte, Action, Vérification, Contrôle, Support) maintenant la vie sur la bonne voie.
descriptions.baseline: Logique de santé professionnelle simplifiée. Un lancement clinique en 4 étapes — Handshake Biologique, Ingestion de Base, Synthèse de Marqueurs, Lancement Pronostique — transformant le bruit clinique en clarté.
descriptions.table-served: Nutrition familiale déterministe — repas programmés depuis des cuisines certifiées US chaque dimanche. Boîtes de stabilité hebdomadaires avec cycle de production Friday Lock / Sunday Pulse et cuisines locales diversifiées.
descriptions.agron-work: Plateforme de talents connectant employeurs et professionnels vérifiés en drones, robotique, IA et automatisation. Embauche directe, certification de compétences et intelligence de la main-d'œuvre pour l'ère de l'autonomie.
descriptions.mrx-health: Explorateur de Réactions Médicamenteuses suivant les prescriptions et surveillant les effets corporels en temps réel. L'analyse bio-scan interactive assure la sécurité des patients et identifie les interactions indésirables précocement.
descriptions.stresscore: Intelligence de l'état psychologique suivant le stress, l'humeur et l'énergie avec des micro-insights IA. Identifie les déclencheurs, prédit les baisses d'énergie et délivre des interventions en temps opportun pour la résilience émotionnelle.
descriptions.skincore: Analyse cutanée IA par caméra suivant la texture, le teint et les changements d'état au fil du temps. Retour au niveau des ingrédients et suivi visuel des tendances aident à comprendre ce qui fonctionne vraiment pour votre peau.
descriptions.seniorcore: Système de soutien pour les seniors et les aidants — surveillance des patterns de bien-être, observance médicamenteuse et niveaux d'activité. Insights santé en temps réel garantissant sécurité, indépendance et tranquillité familiale.
descriptions.vitalcore: Tableau de bord unifié des signes vitaux combinant FC, VFC, sommeil, stress et patterns d'activité. Détecte les anomalies avant les urgences et fournit des alertes actionnables pour une gestion proactive de la santé.
descriptions.bioagecore: Analyse de l'âge biologique par IA comparant l'âge chronologique à l'état réel du corps. Suivi d'optimisation continu et interventions personnalisées aident les utilisateurs à contrôler leur trajectoire de vieillissement.

projectBiomathCore.heroDesc: From sleep to cognition, from movement to mood — BioMath Core brings clarity to your health journey through intelligent real-time insights, 200+ AI-powered services, and a secure personal data vault.
projectBiomathCore.foundationTitle: Core Foundation of the BioMath Ecosystem
projectBiomathCore.foundationDesc: BioMath Core is the central technological foundation upon which all BioMath services are built. Today, the platform powers over 200 specialized AI services across 20 health categories — from Critical Health and Longevity to Mental Wellness and Biohacking. Every BioMath product in our portfolio relies on BioMath Core as its intelligent backbone.
projectBiomathCore.overviewP1: BioMath Core is an intelligent health operating system that unifies medical records, biological data, genetic information, wearable metrics, and lifestyle inputs into a single coherent platform.
projectBiomathCore.overviewP2: Unlike fragmented health apps that track isolated metrics, BioMath Core provides comprehensive analysis across 20 health categories through 200+ specialized AI services — your personal health intelligence layer.
projectBiomathCore.missionSubtitle: Three principles that guide every interaction within the platform
projectBiomathCore.mission1Desc: Convert health signals into meaning, then into gentle supportive guidance. Make complex biology accessible and actionable.
projectBiomathCore.mission2Desc: Build on emotional safety. Users are learning, never failing. Guidance is invitational rather than prescriptive.
projectBiomathCore.mission3Desc: Help users understand how their bodies respond day-to-day. Wellness-first interpretation of patterns, not medical diagnosis.
projectBiomathCore.howSubtitle: Four interconnected stages transform raw health data into daily actionable intelligence
projectBiomathCore.step1Desc: Connect wearables, upload labs, import medical records, add genetic tests. All data flows into the encrypted Model Archive vault.
projectBiomathCore.step2Desc: Server-side engine analyzes data, identifies patterns, correlates metrics across categories, and updates your personal health model continuously.
projectBiomathCore.step3Desc: 200+ specialized AI services examine sleep, nutrition, stress, recovery, cognition, metabolic health and generate personalized insights.
projectBiomathCore.step4Desc: Personalized recommendations through clean dashboards. Visual reports, smart alerts, and context-rich explanations — designed to inform, not alarm.
projectBiomathCore.blackBoxDesc: Your Model Archive — an encrypted vault storing all personal health data with military-grade security. You maintain complete control over data access, sharing, and sovereignty.
projectBiomathCore.categoriesSubtitle: 200+ specialized AI services organized across comprehensive health and wellness domains
projectBiomathCore.visionDesc: BioMath Core aims to become the foundational operating system for personal health — the layer connecting all data sources, generating unified insights, and coordinating wellness across your entire life.
projectBiomathCore.visionDesc2: Over 5-10 years: family health coordination, senior independence through predictive monitoring, smart home integration, automated medication management, and seamless healthcare provider coordination.

projectTerraAero.heroSubtitle: Precision Agriculture and Autonomous Logistics Through Advanced Drone Technology
projectTerraAero.heroDesc: TerraAero develops and operates autonomous drone systems for agricultural monitoring, precision crop management, and intelligent logistics. Combining aerospace engineering with AI-driven analytics and building towards U.S.-based drone manufacturing capabilities.
projectTerraAero.overviewP1: TerraAero combines autonomous aerospace systems with artificial intelligence to deliver scalable solutions for modern agriculture and logistics.
projectTerraAero.overviewP2: Current operations include precision crop spraying, fertilization, field analytics, irrigation monitoring, and logistics delivery across multiple states.
projectTerraAero.mission1Desc: Transform agricultural operations through autonomous drone technology that delivers precision monitoring, resource optimization, and data-driven decision support.
projectTerraAero.mission2Desc: Enable rapid, efficient delivery through autonomous drone systems that reduce transit times, operating costs, and environmental impact.
projectTerraAero.mission3Desc: Develop U.S.-based drone manufacturing infrastructure to reduce supply chain dependencies and optimize aircraft design for specific operational environments.

projectAgron.subtitle: Aerial–Ground Robotics Operations Network
projectAgron.heroDesc: A national-scale infrastructure platform for autonomous aerial and ground robotics — training, certification, operations, and standards across the United States.
projectAgron.positioning1: AGRON is not a robotics startup.
projectAgron.overviewP1: AGRON (Aerial–Ground Robotics Operations Network) is a national-scale infrastructure platform designed to support the training, certification, coordination, and real-world operation of autonomous aerial and ground robotic systems across the United States.
projectAgron.overviewP2: AGRON is not a hardware manufacturer and does not produce drones or robots. Its role is to act as the operational, educational, and regulatory interface between autonomous technologies, human operators, enterprises, and government institutions.
projectAgron.coreMissionDesc: To build a trusted national system that enables safe, scalable, and standardized deployment of autonomous aerial and ground robotic systems for commercial, governmental, and defense applications.

projectMyDay.heroDesc: MyDay transforms daily planning through AI-driven insights, habit tracking, and behavioral optimization. From structured routines to nutrition logging - making better daily decisions simple, measurable, and consistently improving.
projectMyDay.overviewP1: MyDay is an AI-powered daily planning and habit optimization platform designed to help individuals structure their day, track routines, nutrition, and behaviors, and turn everyday data into actionable insights.
projectMyDay.overviewP2: Unlike generic productivity apps or simple habit trackers, MyDay integrates structured planning, behavioral tracking, and AI-driven feedback into a single, cohesive workflow.

projectTableServed.heroDesc: Deterministic family nutrition. Scheduled meals prepared in certified US hubs, delivered every Sunday to reclaim your week. Simple. Structural.
projectTableServed.whatIsDesc: TableServed isn't a delivery app — it's a weekly stability protocol. We've replaced daily chaos with a reliable, predictable rhythm.
projectTableServed.protocolSubtitle: Four deterministic steps. No guesswork, no last-minute decisions.

projectSkinCore.heroSubtitle: Analyse IA de la peau par photos avec suivi des tendances
projectSkinCore.overviewDesc: Skin uses camera-based AI analysis to recognize skin patterns and track visual trends over time. The platform provides recommendations with ingredient-level feedback, helping users understand what works for their skin through daily and weekly tracking without medical positioning.
projectSkinCore.feature1Desc: Camera-based pattern recognition for skin texture, tone, and condition tracking (non-medical).
projectSkinCore.feature2Desc: Monitor skin changes over days and weeks with clear before/after comparisons.
projectSkinCore.feature3Desc: Understand which ingredients work for your skin based on tracking and patterns.
projectSkinCore.feature4Desc: AI identifies correlations between products, routines, and skin condition changes.
projectSkinCore.legalText: Skin is an informational tool for tracking skin appearance patterns. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any skin condition or disease. All recommendations are for informational purposes only. Consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical advice.

projectStressCore.heroSubtitle: Intelligence de l'état psychologique : stress, humeur, énergie avec micro-insights IA
projectStressCore.overviewP1: Stress (Mind) is a lightweight application focusing on psychological state management. In today's fast-paced world, there is a strong market demand for tools that help people understand and stabilize their mental and emotional state. This platform addresses that need with simplicity and precision.
projectStressCore.overviewP2: The platform tracks three core elements: stress levels, mood patterns, and energy fluctuations throughout the day. It provides short AI-generated tips and micro-insights that help users become more aware of their psychological patterns and make small adjustments that have meaningful impact.
projectStressCore.elem1Desc: Simple, intuitive tracking of stress levels throughout the day. Quick check-ins that take seconds. Pattern recognition showing when and why stress peaks occur.
projectStressCore.elem2Desc: Capture emotional state with minimal effort. Track mood shifts over time. Identify triggers and patterns that affect emotional well-being.
projectStressCore.elem3Desc: Monitor energy fluctuations through the day. Understand when you're at your best and when you need rest. Optimize scheduling around natural energy patterns.
projectStressCore.elem4Desc: Ultra-short, actionable tips generated by AI based on your patterns. No long articles or overwhelming advice. Just simple suggestions you can implement immediately.
projectStressCore.elem5Desc: Identify recurring patterns in stress, mood, and energy. Understand how different activities, people, and situations affect your psychological state.
projectStressCore.elem6Desc: Build awareness of your current state throughout the day. Catch stress escalation early. Recognize when you need a break before burnout occurs.
projectStressCore.triadIntro: Stress is built around three interconnected dimensions of psychological state:
projectStressCore.triadStressDesc: Stress is not always negative, but chronic or excessive stress damages health and performance. Stress module helps users track their stress load, identify sources, and recognize when they're approaching overload. Quick check-ins throughout the day create awareness without adding burden.
projectStressCore.triadMoodDesc: Mood affects decision-making, relationships, creativity, and overall quality of life. By tracking mood patterns, users gain insight into what lifts or lowers their emotional state. This awareness enables proactive choices that support emotional stability.
projectStressCore.triadEnergyDesc: Energy levels fluctuate naturally throughout the day, but chronic low energy signals deeper issues. Understanding your energy patterns helps you schedule important tasks during peak periods and protect recovery time when energy is low.
projectStressCore.guide1Desc: Guidance is delivered in ultra-short messages. No paragraphs, no lectures. Just simple suggestions like "Take a 5-minute walk now" or "Schedule a break in the next hour." Users appreciate brevity when they're stressed or busy.
projectStressCore.guide2Desc: The AI learns from your historical data. It recognizes what works for you and what doesn't. Recommendations become more personalized over time, increasing their relevance and impact.
projectStressCore.guide3Desc: Timing matters. Suggestions are delivered when they're most useful: when stress is rising, when mood is dropping, or when energy is depleting. Proactive guidance prevents issues before they escalate.
projectStressCore.use1Desc: Quick, 10-second check-ins at key moments: morning, midday, evening. Build awareness without disrupting workflow. Track how your state evolves as the day progresses.
projectStressCore.use2Desc: When stress and energy data show overload, the system suggests slowing down or redistributing tasks. This helps prevent burnout and maintains sustainable performance over weeks and months.
projectStressCore.use3Desc: Many people operate on autopilot, unaware of their psychological state until it's too late. StressCore builds moment-to-moment awareness, enabling users to make adjustments before small issues become big problems.
projectStressCore.ecosystemIntro: Stress integrates with other components of the BioMath health intelligence platform:
projectStressCore.ecoSleepDesc: Stress and mood during the day directly affect sleep quality at night. Understanding this connection helps users improve both.
projectStressCore.ecoMoveDesc: Physical activity can reduce stress and improve mood. Stress and Move work together to identify activity patterns that support mental well-being.
projectStressCore.ecoVitalDesc: Chronic stress shows up in vital signs like heart rate variability and resting heart rate. Vital uses Stress data to provide early warnings about stress overload.
projectStressCore.ecoCoreDesc: Advanced analysis of psychological patterns and their impact on overall health metrics and risk factors.
projectStressCore.ecoLifeDesc: Aggregates stress, mood, and energy data with other health streams to provide a complete picture of daily well-being.
projectStressCore.marketDesc: There is currently a very strong psychological demand in the market for tools that help people understand and stabilize their mental and emotional state. Work pressure, social complexity, and information overload create constant stress. People want simple, accessible tools that provide clarity and guidance without adding to their cognitive load. StressCore addresses this need with a design philosophy of simplicity, approachability, and actionable insight.
projectStressCore.legalText: Stress (Mind) is an informational tool and is not a mental health treatment or diagnostic system. It does not replace therapy, counseling, or medical intervention for mental health conditions. Users experiencing severe stress, anxiety, depression, or other mental health issues should consult qualified healthcare professionals. All decisions regarding mental and emotional health remain the responsibility of the user.

projectVitalCore.heroSubtitle: Système d'alerte précoce pour les signes vitaux
projectVitalCore.overviewP1: Vital is an early warning system built around vital signs and key health patterns. It analyzes heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), sleep quality, stress levels, and activity data to detect when "something is off." By combining multiple inputs, it identifies subtle changes that indicate the body is under pressure.
projectVitalCore.overviewP2: The platform serves as an early signal engine, showing when the body is approaching overload before serious problems develop. It helps users take preventive action: rest more, reduce stress, adjust activity, or consult healthcare professionals if needed. Vital keeps people engaged because it provides value by warning them early.
projectVitalCore.src1Desc: Continuous heart rate monitoring throughout the day and night. Resting heart rate trends, exercise response, recovery patterns. Elevated resting HR can signal stress, illness, or overtraining.
projectVitalCore.src2Desc: HRV measures the variation in time between heartbeats. Higher HRV typically indicates better recovery and resilience. Declining HRV can signal stress, fatigue, or illness before symptoms appear.
projectVitalCore.src3Desc: Sleep data from Sleep module: duration, stages, interruptions, consistency. Poor sleep affects all other health metrics and increases risk of illness and burnout.
projectVitalCore.src4Desc: Stress data from Stress/Mind module. Chronic stress shows up in vital signs and contributes to cardiovascular risk, immune suppression, and mental health issues.
projectVitalCore.src5Desc: Movement and exercise data from Move. Sudden decreases in activity can indicate fatigue or illness. Overtraining shows up as elevated resting HR and reduced HRV.
projectVitalCore.src6Desc: Vital doesn't just track individual metrics. It looks for patterns across all data sources. Combinations of changes are more meaningful than single indicators.
projectVitalCore.signalTitle: Signal Detection: When Something Is Off
projectVitalCore.signalIntro: Vital continuously analyzes your health data streams, looking for patterns that indicate the body is under pressure. These signals often appear before you feel sick or exhausted:
projectVitalCore.sig1Desc: Deviation from your personal baselines. A sudden increase in resting heart rate, a drop in HRV, or deteriorating sleep quality all signal that something has changed. Vital tracks these shifts and alerts you when they cross thresholds.
projectVitalCore.sig2Desc: Stress, poor sleep, and high activity can accumulate over days or weeks. Each day might seem manageable, but the cumulative load can push the body toward breakdown. Vital tracks this accumulation and warns when you're approaching unsustainable levels.
projectVitalCore.sig3Desc: When activity and stress are high but recovery (sleep, low heart rate, high HRV) is insufficient, the body cannot repair itself. Vital identifies these recovery gaps and recommends adjustments before exhaustion or illness occur.
projectVitalCore.sig4Desc: A single metric out of range might not be concerning, but multiple metrics shifting together indicate a real issue. Vital's strength is combining inputs to generate more accurate and actionable alerts.
projectVitalCore.alert1Desc: Vital alerts are designed to be early and gentle. They're not medical alarms or panic-inducing notifications. Instead, they're friendly reminders that your body is showing signs of stress and might need attention.
projectVitalCore.alert2Desc: Alerts come with suggestions: "Consider getting extra sleep tonight," "Reduce intense exercise for a few days," "Check stress levels and take breaks." These recommendations are practical and immediately implementable.
projectVitalCore.alert3Desc: Users can view their vital signs over time: heart rate trends, HRV changes, sleep quality patterns. Visual feedback helps them understand what's improving, what's declining, and why.
projectVitalCore.alert4Desc: Vital keeps users engaged because it provides real, tangible value. When the system warns them of approaching illness or burnout, and they take action and avoid the issue, they trust the platform more. This trust drives long-term engagement and usage.
projectVitalCore.ecosystemTitle: How VitalCore Ties Into the Portfolio
projectVitalCore.ecosystemIntro: Vital is the "sentry" for the BioMath ecosystem. It sits at the center of the platform, monitoring all incoming health data streams and watching for early warning signs:
projectVitalCore.ecoSleepDesc: Provides sleep quality data that feeds into Vital's recovery assessment and early warning algorithms.
projectVitalCore.ecoStressDesc: Supplies stress and mood data that helps Vital understand psychological load and its impact on physical health.
projectVitalCore.ecoMoveDesc: Contributes activity and movement data to assess whether the user is balancing exertion with recovery.
projectVitalCore.ecoCoreDesc: Provides advanced computational analysis and risk modeling based on the vital signs and patterns detected by Vital.
projectVitalCore.ecoLifeDesc: Aggregates all health streams, with Vital serving as the central early warning layer that protects users from overload and guides them toward sustainable health practices.
projectVitalCore.use1Desc: Avoid overtraining by monitoring recovery through HRV and resting heart rate. Adjust training intensity based on Vital's early warnings.
projectVitalCore.use2Desc: Track the physiological impact of work stress. Receive early warnings when stress is affecting cardiovascular health and recovery capacity.
projectVitalCore.use3Desc: Monitor overall health trends and catch potential issues early. Use Vital as a continuous health check that guides lifestyle decisions.
projectVitalCore.legalText: Vital is an informational tool and early warning system. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any medical condition. Alerts and insights are based on pattern recognition and should not replace professional medical evaluation. Users experiencing concerning symptoms or health changes should consult qualified healthcare professionals. All decisions regarding health and medical care remain the responsibility of the user and their healthcare providers.

projectBioAgeCore.heroSubtitle: Analyse IA de l'âge biologique et suivi d'optimisation
projectBioAgeCore.overviewP1: BioAge provides biological age estimation based on real-life signals including sleep, recovery, stress, and activity patterns. Biological age serves as a high-level indicator of system health, reflecting how well your body is functioning relative to your chronological age.
projectBioAgeCore.overviewP2: The platform tracks trajectory and dynamics to show whether biological age is improving or worsening over time, providing clear explanations about influencing factors without medical claims.
projectBioAgeCore.func1Desc: AI-powered analysis estimates your biological age based on comprehensive health signals and lifestyle patterns.
projectBioAgeCore.func2Desc: Monitor whether your biological age is improving or worsening over time with clear trend visualization.
projectBioAgeCore.func3Desc: Understand which lifestyle factors have the strongest impact on your biological age indicators.
projectBioAgeCore.func4Desc: Receive actionable recommendations on what can improve your bio-age based on your unique patterns.
projectBioAgeCore.func5Desc: Combines sleep quality, stress levels, recovery patterns, and activity data into comprehensive bio-age analysis.
projectBioAgeCore.func6Desc: All insights are presented in clear, understandable language without medical jargon or complex terminology.
projectBioAgeCore.step1Desc: BioAge gathers comprehensive data from wearables, health apps, and manual inputs to build a complete picture of your health signals and lifestyle patterns.
projectBioAgeCore.step2Desc: Advanced machine learning algorithms process multiple health indicators simultaneously to estimate biological age based on proven correlations with aging markers.
projectBioAgeCore.step3Desc: Track changes in your biological age over weeks and months, identifying whether lifestyle changes are having positive or negative effects on aging indicators.
projectBioAgeCore.step4Desc: Receive targeted recommendations based on your specific patterns, highlighting which factors you can influence to potentially improve your biological age trajectory.

projectBioAgeCore.signal3: Physical activity levels and movement patterns
projectBioAgeCore.signal5: Daily energy levels and fatigue patterns
projectBioAgeCore.signal6: Recovery capacity after physical or mental stress
projectBioAgeCore.ecosystemDesc: BioAge serves as a high-level health indicator within the BioMath ecosystem, synthesizing insights from multiple specialized modules to provide an overarching view of biological health status.
projectBioAgeCore.intSleepDesc: Sleep data provides crucial input for biological age estimation, as sleep quality is strongly correlated with aging processes.
projectBioAgeCore.intStressDesc: Chronic stress patterns are key factors in accelerated biological aging, making this integration essential.
projectBioAgeCore.intVitalDesc: Heart rate variability and other vital signs feed directly into bio-age calculations.
projectBioAgeCore.intMoveDesc: Physical activity patterns contribute significantly to biological age assessment.

projectBioAgeCore.ben2Desc: People interested in understanding and potentially slowing their biological aging process through informed choices.
projectBioAgeCore.ben3Desc: Athletes who want to optimize training and recovery while monitoring overall system health and aging markers.
projectBioAgeCore.ben4Desc: Health coaches and wellness practitioners seeking objective metrics to guide client interventions.
projectBioAgeCore.legalText: BioAge is an informational tool that provides estimates of biological age based on lifestyle and health data. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or medical condition. The biological age estimates are for informational and educational purposes only. All health decisions should be made in consultation with qualified healthcare professionals. BioAge does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

projectSeniorCore.heroSubtitle: Système de soutien pour les seniors et leurs aidants
projectSeniorCore.overviewP1: Senior is designed for simplicity and clarity, helping seniors maintain independence and daily structure. The platform serves both seniors and their caregivers by organizing essential information and routines in an accessible, easy-to-use format that promotes well-being and confidence.
projectSeniorCore.overviewP2: By focusing on practical daily needs—medication reminders, routine tracking, and gentle health monitoring—Senior supports aging in place while providing peace of mind for family members and professional caregivers.
projectSeniorCore.func1Desc: Medication schedules, hydration alerts, and daily routine reminders delivered with clear, gentle notifications.
projectSeniorCore.func2Desc: Monitor patterns that may indicate health changes, helping identify when professional consultation may be beneficial (non-medical).
projectSeniorCore.func3Desc: Simple tracking of basic health measurements with clear trend visualizations and historical records.
projectSeniorCore.func4Desc: Age-appropriate recommendations for maintaining safe and healthy daily routines.
projectSeniorCore.func5Desc: Track medical appointments, prepare questions, and maintain records of healthcare provider visits.
projectSeniorCore.func6Desc: Share selected information with family members and caregivers to enable coordinated support.
projectSeniorCore.step1Desc: Easy onboarding process with large text, clear instructions, and optional assistance from family members or caregivers.
projectSeniorCore.step2Desc: Establish consistent daily routines with timed reminders for medications, meals, hydration, and activities.
projectSeniorCore.step3Desc: Track health measurements and daily activities without intrusive surveillance, respecting independence and privacy.
projectSeniorCore.step4Desc: Optional sharing features allow trusted family members or caregivers to stay informed and provide appropriate support.

projectSeniorCore.benefit3: Health pattern tracking that identifies concerning changes early
projectSeniorCore.benefit4: Supports independence while providing safety net through caregiver coordination
projectSeniorCore.benefit5: Reduces cognitive load by organizing health information in one clear location
projectSeniorCore.benefit6: Peace of mind for both seniors and their families
projectSeniorCore.ecosystemDesc: Senior adapts the BioMath health intelligence platform to meet the specific needs of senior users, prioritizing simplicity, safety, and dignity.
projectSeniorCore.designAccessDesc: Every interface element is designed with senior usability in mind—large buttons, clear labels, and straightforward navigation.
projectSeniorCore.designIndepDesc: Helps seniors maintain autonomy while providing appropriate oversight and assistance when needed.
projectSeniorCore.designCaregiverDesc: Balances senior privacy with caregiver need-to-know, enabling effective support without invasiveness.
projectSeniorCore.designPracticalDesc: Emphasizes daily life management over complex analysis or optimization metrics.
projectSeniorCore.ideal1Desc: Older adults living independently who want support maintaining healthy routines and medication schedules.
projectSeniorCore.ideal2Desc: Adult children supporting aging parents who live separately and need coordination tools.
projectSeniorCore.ideal3Desc: Home health aides and care coordinators managing multiple senior clients with different needs and schedules.

projectSeniorCore.legalText: Senior is an informational and organizational tool designed to help seniors and caregivers manage daily health routines and track basic health information. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any medical condition. The information provided is for organizational and educational purposes only. All medical decisions should be made in consultation with qualified healthcare professionals. Senior does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

projectSaven.heroDesc: Combler le fossé entre la compréhension numérique et la réalité physique. Nous ne faisons pas de médecine — nous faisons en sorte que la vie ne s'effondre pas entre les épisodes.
projectSaven.systemDesc: La médecine traite les épisodes. Mais les soins ne se brisent pas cliniquement — ils se brisent opérationnellement. SAVEN est la couche d'exécution entre la compréhension numérique et la vie physique.
projectSaven.notItem1: Pas une application médicale (ne nécessite aucun effort cognitif)
projectSaven.notItem2: Pas un assistant IA (ne dépend pas des mots de l'utilisateur)
projectSaven.notItem3: Pas un robot (les robots ne sont que des corps)
projectSaven.notItem4: Pas une plateforme de soins générique

projectSaven.isItem2: Un système qui force l'exécution des plans, pas seulement leur recommandation
projectSaven.isItem3: L'intelligence et la logique — les robots et appareils ne sont que des corps

projectSaven.envHomeDesc: SAVEN maintient les routines quotidiennes et détecte les écarts avant qu'ils ne s'aggravent.
projectSaven.envHospitalDesc: Assure la continuité des soins pendant les épisodes médicaux les plus vulnérables.
projectSaven.envInstitutionDesc: Crée des ponts de soins fluides entre les environnements et les équipes.
projectSaven.envNote: Les politiques, règles et rôles changent. La logique d'exécution et de vérification reste identique.
projectSaven.bodyDesc1: Les applications nécessitent un effort cognitif et échouent sous le stress. Les robots font des mouvements mais ne prennent aucune responsabilité. SAVEN est le lien — indépendant de la forme du corps.
projectSaven.bodyDesc2: Il connecte le numérique et le physique sans fantasmes.
projectSaven.bridgeProblemDesc: La période post-hospitalière est le moment le plus vulnérable dans la vie d'une personne.
projectSaven.bridgeSolutionDesc: SAVEN maintient la routine quand le patient est trop faible. Il préserve l'exécution et corrige les écarts précocement.
projectSaven.bridgeImpactDesc: Moins de réadmissions, moins de chaos, moins de pression sur la famille.
projectSaven.presentationDesc: Téléchargez la présentation complète de l'infrastructure d'exécution continue SAVEN.
projectSaven.econCostDesc: L'historique ne peut pas être copié-collé. Le contexte et les trajectoires accumulés créent un verrouillage profond.
projectSaven.econLTVDesc: La précision augmente avec la durée. Plus le système fonctionne, plus il prend de la valeur.
projectSaven.econRiskDesc: Risque prévisible pour les assureurs. Chaque action vérifiée réduit l'incertitude.
projectSaven.econNote: Le marché n'a pas besoin de nouvelles applications. Le marché a besoin d'infrastructure de continuité.
projectSaven.providersDesc: L'humain est le bénéficiaire du système, mais pas le client de l'infrastructure. SAVEN permet aux organisations de garantir les soins qu'elles promettent.

projectBaseLine.heroSubtitle: La logique de santé professionnelle simplifiée
projectBaseLine.heroDesc: Professional health logic made simple. Understand your data, live a longer life. We translate clinical noise into human clarity.
projectBaseLine.whatIsDesc: BaseLine is a BioMath Core health intelligence platform. It takes your raw clinical data — blood tests, vitals, biomarkers — and translates them into clear, actionable longevity insights. Learn the logic behind your longevity through dual-opinion science and AI-powered prognostics.
projectBaseLine.feat1Desc: Secure BioID with 256-bit encryption creates a unique mathematical anchor for your biological data.
projectBaseLine.feat2Desc: Enter your Static Vitals (BP, Heart Rate) — the "Current Location" on your health map.
projectBaseLine.feat3Desc: Upload blood tests. Our engine turns raw numbers into Emerald, Amber, or Red status markers.
projectBaseLine.feat4Desc: See where your current path leads in 10 years and identify which habit shift moves the needle most.
projectBaseLine.clinicalSubtitle: Follow this path to move from raw data to actionable life-extension insights.
projectBaseLine.clin1Desc: Set up your secure BioID. We don't just store name and email — we create a unique mathematical anchor for your biological data using 256-bit encryption.
projectBaseLine.clin2Desc: Enter your "Static Vitals" (BP, Heart Rate). Think of this as the "Current Location" on your health map. Without a baseline, we cannot calculate a destination.
projectBaseLine.clin3Desc: Upload your Lab Digest (Blood Tests). Our engine reads the "raw numbers" that doctors often don't have time to explain, turning them into Emerald, Amber, or Red status.
projectBaseLine.clin4Desc: Run the "My Future AI" (Trajectory). See where your current path leads in 10 years and identify exactly which habit shift moves the needle the most.
projectBaseLine.futureAIDesc: Longitudinal statistical forecasting and biological decay modeling.
projectBaseLine.predictiveDesc: Shifting the focus from "reactive" healthcare to a "predictive maintenance" model of biological optimization.
projectBaseLine.statisticalDesc: Projections derived from large-scale longitudinal datasets (NHANES) cross-referenced with your personal biomarker history.
projectBaseLine.invest1: Built on BioMath Core — the foundational architecture powering 200+ health services
projectBaseLine.invest2: AI-driven predictive health modeling shifts healthcare from reactive to preventive
projectBaseLine.invest3: Clinical-grade data synthesis with NHANES longitudinal dataset integration
projectBaseLine.invest4: 20+ clinical services spanning diagnostics, genomics, AI forecasting, and medication management
projectBaseLine.invest5: SaaS subscription model with B2B licensing potential for clinics and health systems
projectBaseLine.invest6: Scalable, secure architecture with 256-bit encryption and regulatory-ready compliance
projectBaseLine.ctaDesc: Submitting interest is non-binding and does not create any agreement. All potential participation is discussed individually and offline.

projectMRXHealth.heroDesc: Know your medicine inside out. We track your pills and monitor how you feel — keeping you safe and your doctor informed.
projectMRXHealth.whatIsDesc: MRX.Health is a Medication Reactions Explorer — a digital health tool that helps users track their medications, monitor side effects and reactions, and share transparent data with healthcare providers. It's not medical advice — it's what's actually happening with your body when you take your pills.
projectMRXHealth.feat1Desc: Log every pill you take with dosage, timing, and frequency — building a complete medication history.
projectMRXHealth.feat2Desc: Real-time molecular identification and stability assessment of your medications.
projectMRXHealth.feat3Desc: Track how you feel after taking medications — log symptoms, side effects, and changes in well-being.
projectMRXHealth.feat4Desc: Automatic cross-referencing of your medication list to flag potential drug-to-drug interactions.
projectMRXHealth.step1Desc: Enter all prescriptions, supplements, and over-the-counter drugs you currently take. The system builds your personal medication profile.
projectMRXHealth.step2Desc: MRX analyzes each medication for molecular stability, checks known interaction databases, and creates a real-time safety profile.
projectMRXHealth.step3Desc: Log daily symptoms, mood changes, energy levels, and any unusual reactions. The platform correlates your reports with medication timing.
projectMRXHealth.step4Desc: Generate clear, data-driven reports showing medication timelines, reaction patterns, and interaction alerts — ready for your healthcare provider.
projectMRXHealth.capabilitiesSubtitle: A comprehensive medication management ecosystem designed for transparency and safety
projectMRXHealth.cap1Desc: Track prescriptions, OTC drugs, vitamins, and supplements in one unified dashboard.
projectMRXHealth.cap2Desc: Machine learning algorithms identify correlations between medications and reported symptoms over time.
projectMRXHealth.cap3Desc: Real-time warnings when your medication combinations may pose interaction risks.
projectMRXHealth.cap4Desc: Visual charts and timelines showing how your body responds to each medication across days, weeks, and months.
projectMRXHealth.cap5Desc: Generate professional medical reports that your healthcare provider can review and act upon.
projectMRXHealth.cap6Desc: Smart reminders to take medications on time, with tracking of missed or delayed doses.
projectMRXHealth.who1Desc: Anyone taking multiple medications who wants to understand how drugs interact and affect their daily well-being.
projectMRXHealth.who2Desc: Doctors and pharmacists who need transparent, patient-reported data to make better-informed treatment decisions.
projectMRXHealth.who3Desc: Family members managing medications for elderly parents or dependents who need reliable tracking and alerts.
projectMRXHealth.disclaimerDesc: MRX.Health does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment recommendations. The platform tracks and visualizes data about your medications and how you report feeling — nothing more. Always consult your healthcare provider for medical decisions.
projectMRXHealth.invest1: Growing global demand for medication safety and drug interaction monitoring tools
projectMRXHealth.invest2: Subscription-based SaaS model with potential for B2B healthcare provider licensing
projectMRXHealth.invest3: AI-driven pattern detection creates a defensible data moat over time
projectMRXHealth.invest4: Part of the Digital Invest digital health ecosystem with cross-platform synergies
projectMRXHealth.invest5: Addresses a real patient safety gap — adverse drug reactions are a leading cause of hospital visits
projectMRXHealth.invest6: Scalable architecture ready for multi-language and multi-region deployment
projectMRXHealth.ctaDesc: Submitting interest is non-binding and does not create any agreement. All potential participation is discussed individually and offline.

projectLongevityCore.heroSubtitle: Planification IA personnalisée de la longévité
projectLongevityCore.overviewP1: Longevity delivers AI-driven longevity planning that integrates seamlessly into daily life. Rather than prescribing one-size-fits-all protocols, the platform adapts to personal patterns and routines, making sustainable improvements realistic and achievable.
projectLongevityCore.overviewP2: By focusing on sleep optimization, nutritional insights, movement patterns, biorhythms, and behavior recognition, Longevity helps users make informed decisions about their long-term health trajectory through practical, evidence-based recommendations.
projectLongevityCore.func1Desc: Personalized sleep recommendations based on your patterns, schedule, and recovery needs for optimal restoration.
projectLongevityCore.func2Desc: Evidence-based nutrition guidance with specific recommendations on nutrients and supplementation (non-medical).
projectLongevityCore.func3Desc: Activity suggestions tailored to your fitness level, schedule, and longevity goals for sustainable practice.
projectLongevityCore.func4Desc: Understand your natural energy cycles and align activities with peak performance windows throughout the day.
projectLongevityCore.func5Desc: AI identifies habits and patterns that support or hinder longevity goals, providing targeted improvement areas.
projectLongevityCore.func6Desc: Plans evolve based on your progress, challenges, and changing circumstances for sustained engagement.
projectLongevityCore.step1Desc: Longevity begins by understanding your current lifestyle, health patterns, constraints, and goals through comprehensive data collection and analysis.
projectLongevityCore.step2Desc: AI algorithms create a customized longevity plan that fits your schedule, preferences, and capabilities, ensuring recommendations are practical and sustainable.
projectLongevityCore.step3Desc: As you implement changes and provide feedback, the system learns and adapts, refining recommendations to better match what works for you individually.
projectLongevityCore.step4Desc: Monitor improvements across multiple dimensions—sleep quality, energy levels, stress management, and physical fitness—to see the cumulative impact of lifestyle changes.
projectLongevityCore.benefit1: Sleep schedule optimization based on your chronotype and obligations
projectLongevityCore.benefit2: Nutrition patterns that fit your lifestyle, budget, and preferences
projectLongevityCore.benefit3: Movement strategies that integrate into daily routines and work schedules
projectLongevityCore.benefit4: Stress management techniques aligned with your personality and triggers
projectLongevityCore.benefit6: Behavior modification strategies based on proven psychological principles
projectLongevityCore.ecosystemDesc: Longevity serves as the strategic planning layer within the BioMath ecosystem, coordinating insights from multiple modules to create a comprehensive longevity roadmap.
projectLongevityCore.designDataDesc: Aggregates insights from Sleep, Stress, Move, Vital, and other modules to inform strategic recommendations.
projectLongevityCore.designHolisticDesc: Unlike single-focus modules, Longevity coordinates across all health dimensions for maximum synergistic effect.
projectLongevityCore.designLongTermDesc: Focuses on sustainable improvements over months and years rather than quick fixes or short-term gains.
projectLongevityCore.designPersonalDesc: Adapts all module outputs to create a cohesive plan that matches individual needs and circumstances.
projectLongevityCore.ideal1Desc: People committed to maximizing healthspan and lifespan through evidence-based lifestyle optimization.
projectLongevityCore.ideal2Desc: Individuals seeking a comprehensive, data-driven approach to health improvement across all major domains.
projectLongevityCore.ideal3Desc: Those who prefer proactive health management over reactive medical interventions.
projectLongevityCore.ideal4Desc: People with demanding schedules who need efficient, practical strategies for long-term health maintenance.
projectLongevityCore.legalText: Longevity is an informational and educational tool that provides personalized lifestyle recommendations based on health data and scientific research. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. The recommendations provided are for informational purposes only and should not replace professional medical advice. All health decisions should be made in consultation with qualified healthcare professionals. Longevity does not provide medical, nutritional, or therapeutic services.

projectFamilyCore.heroSubtitle: Un compagnon santé pratique pour les parents et les familles
projectFamilyCore.overviewP1: Family simplifies daily health decisions for parents by organizing health-related routines in one clear interface. The platform is designed to reduce complexity and provide quick access to important health information, making family health management more efficient and less stressful.
projectFamilyCore.overviewP2: From tracking children's health patterns to managing vaccination schedules and nutrition planning, Family helps parents stay organized and informed without feeling overwhelmed by medical terminology or complex systems.
projectFamilyCore.func1Desc: Centralized dashboard showing each child's health status, recent changes, and areas needing attention.
projectFamilyCore.func2Desc: Track sleep patterns and receive age-appropriate recommendations for healthy sleep routines.
projectFamilyCore.func3Desc: Informational vaccination tracking with reminders for upcoming appointments (non-medical guidance).
projectFamilyCore.func4Desc: Age-appropriate nutrition guidance and meal planning ideas tailored to family preferences and needs.
projectFamilyCore.func5Desc: Track developmental milestones and physical growth with age-appropriate benchmarks (informational only).
projectFamilyCore.func6Desc: Record illnesses, injuries, and health events for easy reference during medical appointments.
projectFamilyCore.step1Desc: Create profiles for each child with age, basic health information, and any special considerations or preferences.
projectFamilyCore.step2Desc: Set up daily health routines including sleep schedules, meal times, medication reminders, and activity goals.
projectFamilyCore.step3Desc: Receive timely notifications for important health tasks, appointments, and routine care activities.
projectFamilyCore.step4Desc: Monitor health patterns over time with simple visualizations that highlight improvements or areas needing attention.
projectFamilyCore.benefit1: All family health information in one easy-to-access location
projectFamilyCore.benefit2: Clear reminders for appointments, medications, and routine care
projectFamilyCore.benefit3: Age-appropriate guidance without overwhelming medical complexity
projectFamilyCore.benefit4: Historical health records ready for pediatrician visits
projectFamilyCore.benefit5: Nutrition and sleep recommendations based on current research
projectFamilyCore.benefit6: Peace of mind knowing important health tasks won't be forgotten
projectFamilyCore.ecosystemDesc: Family extends the BioMath ecosystem to family health management, applying proven health intelligence principles to the unique needs of parents and children.
projectFamilyCore.designPracticalDesc: While other modules target individual optimization, Family prioritizes practical organization and peace of mind for busy parents.
projectFamilyCore.designAgeDesc: Recommendations are tailored to each child's developmental stage and family circumstances.
projectFamilyCore.designSimpleDesc: Designed for quick check-ins during busy daily routines rather than deep analysis.
projectFamilyCore.designInfoDesc: Focuses on making health information accessible and actionable for non-medical users.
projectFamilyCore.ideal1Desc: Parents juggling work and family who need efficient health management without complexity.
projectFamilyCore.ideal2Desc: New parents who want guidance and organization as they navigate childhood health milestones.
projectFamilyCore.ideal3Desc: Families with multiple children needing to track different ages, schedules, and health needs.
projectFamilyCore.ideal4Desc: Families prioritizing preventive health and wanting to establish good habits early in childhood.
projectFamilyCore.legalText: Family is an informational and organizational tool designed to help parents manage family health routines. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any medical condition. The information and guidance provided are for educational purposes only. All medical decisions regarding children's health should be made in consultation with qualified pediatric healthcare professionals. Family does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

adamas.heroSubtitle: Une collection diversifiée de projets couvrant l'industrie du diamant, la robotique, le commerce électronique, les actifs numériques et la technologie vétérinaire.

disclaimer.title: Avis Important:
disclaimer.text: Cette section est à titre informatif uniquement. Les projets Adamas Materials sont présentés séparément et ne constituent pas une offre publique.

adamasMaterials.title: Adamas Materials
adamasMaterials.description: Fournisseur B2B/B2G américain de diamants techniques et de matériaux avancés pour les laboratoires de recherche, la R&D industrielle, les secteurs gouvernemental et de la défense.
adamasMaterials.longDescription:
Adamas Materials est une entreprise B2B/B2G basée aux États-Unis, spécialisée dans la fourniture de diamants techniques et de matériaux avancés aux laboratoires de recherche, aux divisions R&D corporatives et aux structures gouvernementales et de défense.

Le portefeuille produits couvre quatre directions stratégiques : matériaux quantiques et de détection, matériaux de gestion thermique, outillage et composants anti-usure, ainsi que matériaux et minéraux de support avec spécifications techniques complètes.

Positionné comme fournisseur industriel et scientifique — ni grand public, ni joaillerie — Adamas Materials opère sur un modèle RFQ sans tarification publique, avec une orientation strictement contractuelle et orientée recherche.

originDiamond.title: Origin Diamond
originDiamond.description: Service de diamants lab-grown personnalisés où le client co-crée sa pierre — choisit les paramètres, intègre un message caché et reçoit un diamant certifié unique lié à son histoire.
originDiamond.longDescription:
Origin Diamond est un service et une application où le client ne achète pas un diamant fini — il le crée. La plateforme guide chaque personne à travers la sélection des paramètres, la participation au processus de croissance, le suivi des étapes et la réception d'une pierre certifiée avec un message personnel caché lisible uniquement à travers une lentille propriétaire.

Le parcours client comprend sept étapes : quiz de valeurs personnelles, sélection des paramètres, couche de message (nom, date, phrase ou code), confirmation d'irréversibilité, timeline de croissance avec jalons, design guidé du bijou et kit reveal — pierre, lentille et certificat de naissance.

Un diamant que vous avez aidé à créer. Un message que vous seul pouvez lire. Une histoire qui reste.

agronNet.title: AGRON-NET
agronNet.description: Infrastructure nationale pour la robotique autonome aérienne et terrestre — formation, certification, opérations de flotte et normes. L'épine dorsale opérationnelle de l'économie robotique américaine.
agronNet.longDescription:
AGRON est une plateforme d'infrastructure nationale conçue pour soutenir la formation, la certification, la coordination et l'exploitation réelle des systèmes robotiques autonomes aériens et terrestres aux États-Unis.

AGRON ne fabrique pas de drones ni de robots. Son rôle est d'agir comme interface opérationnelle, éducative et réglementaire entre les technologies autonomes, les opérateurs, les entreprises et les institutions gouvernementales.

Domaines clés : robotique aérienne (drones, UAS, BVLOS, essaim), robotique terrestre (UGV, plateformes mobiles, logistique, sécurité) et missions combinées air-sol.

agronWork.title: AGRON-Work
agronWork.description: Plateforme de talents connectant les employeurs avec des professionnels vérifiés en drones, robotique, IA et automatisation. Recrutement direct, certification et intelligence de la main-d'œuvre.
agronWork.longDescription: AGRON-Work est une plateforme spécialisée d'acquisition de talents pour l'industrie de la robotique autonome. Elle connecte les employeurs avec des professionnels vérifiés — des pilotes de drones aux ingénieurs roboticiens et spécialistes IA — avec certification, parcours de carrière et planification d'effectifs.
